// Code generated by github.com/romshark/datapages; DO NOT EDIT.

// Package action provides generators for datastar action hypertext references.
// These references must be used in the templates.
package action

import (
	"strconv"
	"strings"
)

// POSTPageCoordMark references /coord/{lat}/
func POSTPageCoordMark(lat float64) string {
	s_lat := strconv.FormatFloat(lat, 'f', -1, 64)
	var b strings.Builder
	b.Grow(len("@post('/coord/") + len(s_lat) + len("/')"))
	b.WriteString("@post('/coord/")
	b.WriteString(s_lat)
	b.WriteString("/')")
	return b.String()
}
